parts.description:
Directive: rdxCheckboxButton
Purpose: Turns a native <button> into an accessible checkbox control bound to the Radix Checkbox context.
It mirrors the checkbox state via ARIA/data attributes, toggles on click, and prevents Enter activation per WAI-ARIA.
In forms, it stops the button's click from bubbling so only the hidden input emits the native event used for form/validator integration.

Groups a set of checkboxes that share a single array value (the values of the checked boxes).

Each child `rdxCheckboxRoot` participates by its `value` (falling back to `name`). A child marked
`parent` becomes a "select all" checkbox whose state is derived from `allValues`.

inputs.name: allValues
inputs.description: All checkbox values in the group. Required for a `parent` (select-all) checkbox.

inputs.name: defaultValue
inputs.description: The values checked initially when the group is uncontrolled.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the whole group is disabled.

inputs.name: form
inputs.description: Associates the group with an external form by id.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Native form field name. Selected values are submitted as repeated entries under this name.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The values of the currently checked checkboxes. Use with `onValueChange` or `[(value)]`.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending controls publish neither `data-valid` nor `data-invalid`.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Whether the control has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; set on blur/focus-out.

outputs.name: onValueChange
outputs.description: Emits the new array of checked values whenever the value changes.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits when the control is touched, notifying Signal Forms (stable Angular 22 contract).

inputs.name: keepMounted
inputs.description: Keep the indicator in the DOM when unchecked so CSS exit animations can play.

inputs.name: checked
inputs.description:
The controlled checked state of the checkbox. Must be used in conjunction with onCheckedChange.

Mixed state is no longer expressed through `checked` — use the separate
`indeterminate` input (Base UI shape). This `boolean` model is what
`RdxFormCheckboxControl` / Angular Signal Forms bind to.

inputs.name: defaultChecked
inputs.description: The state of the checkbox when it is initially rendered.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the checked state changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether or not the checkbox button is disabled. This prevents the user from interacting with it.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the checkbox. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: form
inputs.description: Associates the control with a form element.

inputs.name: indeterminate
inputs.description:
Whether the checkbox is in a mixed state: neither ticked nor unticked.
Orthogonal to `checked` and not part of the submitted form value. A user
click resolves the checkbox to `checked` and clears `indeterminate`.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the checkbox is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
Name of a standalone form control. Inside a `rdxCheckboxGroup`, prefer `[value]` to identify
the item; `name` remains a compatibility fallback for existing group templates.

inputs.name: parent
inputs.description:
When inside a `rdxCheckboxGroup`, marks this as the "select all" checkbox: its state is
derived from the group's `allValues`, and toggling it checks or unchecks every child.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending checkboxes publish neither valid nor invalid state.

inputs.name: readOnly
inputs.description:
Whether the user should be unable to tick or untick the checkbox. Bound in templates as
`readOnly` (Base UI spelling); the TS member stays `readonly` to satisfy `RdxFormCheckboxControl`.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Whether or not the checkbox is required.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
The value of the checkbox. This is what is submitted with the form when the checkbox is checked.

Bound publicly as `[value]`; the TS member is named `submitValue` so the
directive can satisfy `RdxFormCheckboxControl`, whose contract reserves a
`value` member for `RdxFormValueControl` and forbids it on checkbox-style
controls.
When omitted, native submission uses the browser checkbox default (`on`). Inside a
`rdxCheckboxGroup`, the child's `name` is used as a compatibility fallback.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description:
Whether the checkbox has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; the checkbox
also sets it on toggle (and emits {@link touch}).

inputs.name: uncheckedValue
inputs.description:
The value submitted with the form when the checkbox is unchecked.
By default, unchecked checkboxes do not submit any value, matching native checkbox behavior.

outputs.name: onCheckedChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the checkbox checked state changes.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits on interaction, notifying Signal Forms the checkbox was touched.
